rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Implementation-level signal routing should be defined in the component implementation annex
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference ports valid in that scope
Implementation annexes should bind to subcomponents and connections present in that scope
AADL model structure determines valid identifiers and scoping rules for AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings require valid subcomponent and connection references
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
